rules.minimum_safety_condition: The explicit strain cue is no longer being intensified.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: A cited uncertainty has a verifiable resolution path.
rules.uncertainty_rule: Only the cited unknown is modeled; unobserved uncertainty is not inferred.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: The cited inconsistency can be verified without forced trust.
rules.uncertainty_rule: The cue does not establish motive; it models only cited inconsistency.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: Consent and refusal remain explicit and revocable.
rules.uncertainty_rule: Only an explicit boundary or consent cue is mapped.

rules.uncertainty_rule: No hidden attachment history is inferred from the explicit separation cue.

packet.caveat: Profile-blind verbal-analytical packet for the conceptual REI simulator; it contains no character authority or hidden Emocio/Instinkt motive.
constraints: The animal must remain in view.
Only the three public options may be used.
explicit_facts: The animal is visible on a ledge about six metres below the observer.
Small fragments fall from the slope when rocks shift, creating physical danger.
A ten-metre rope and loop are available for use from a stable platform.
Trained help reported an arrival time of about seven minutes.
The structured scene shows an animal on a ledge, a crumbling slope, a stable platform, and a coiled rope.

explicit_options.description: Approach the animal by stepping onto the slope.
explicit_options.label: Direct entry

explicit_options.description: Protect the stable position while using the rope and loop.
explicit_options.label: Attempt from a distance

explicit_options.description: Avoid entering the slope and wait on the platform for trained help.
explicit_options.label: Wait for help

explicit_unknowns: Whether the slope will remain stable for the next seven minutes is unknown.
Whether the animal is injured is unknown.
rules: Compare exposure, tool reach, delay, and uncertain slope stability without inferring injury.

constraints.text: Žival mora ostati v vidnem polju.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

evidence.content: Žival je vidna na polici približno šest metrov pod opazovalcem.
S pobočja se ob premiku kamenja sproščajo manjši delci, kar predstavlja fizično nevarnost.
Na voljo sta desetmetrska vrv in zanka, ki ju je mogoče uporabiti s stabilne ploščadi.
Usposobljena pomoč je sporočila prihod čez približno sedem minut.
Strukturirani prizor kaže žival na polici, drobljivo pobočje, stabilno ploščad in navito vrv.

options.description: Stopi na pobočje in se približaj živali.
options.label: Neposreden vstop

options.description: S stabilne ploščadi uporabi vrv in zanko.
options.label: Poskus z razdalje

options.description: Ostani na ploščadi in počakaj na usposobljeno pomoč.
options.label: Čakanje na pomoč

canonical_sl.raw_input: Žival je ujeta ob nestabilnem pobočju; izberi neposreden vstop, poskus z razdalje ali čakanje na pomoč.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bo pobočje ostalo stabilno naslednjih sedem minut.
Ni znano, ali je žival poškodovana.
